cause_of_action: OTHER CIVIL PETITIONS (to confirm, correct or vacate contractual arbitration award)

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT DARUKA WANIGATUNGA AND DBA CAFE COCOMO BA $12,291.80 PRINCIPAL, $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,054.81 INTEREST, $445.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,291.61, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AS JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AS JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 26, 2015 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 26, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC INC.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, HEARING ON PETITITON TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD AS JUDGMENT, IS DENIED. MATTER WAS CONTINUED ON DECEMBER 26, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 BY DECEMBER 26, 2014. MOVING PARTY WAS WARNED THAT FAILURE TO DO SO WOULD RESULT IN THE MOTION BEING DENIED. COURTESY COPIES HAVE NOT BEEN RECEIVED IN DEPARTMENT 302 AND THEREFORE THE MOTION IS DENIED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302 (302/AJR)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DAVE MARCOLINI, Tel No. (949) 718-2020, specially appearing on behalf of Petitioner Broadcast Music, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Hearing On Petititon To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment is denied. Matter was continued on December 26, 2014 to give moving party an opportunity to comply with local rule 2.6B and deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302 by December 26, 2014. Moving party was warned that failure to do so would result in the motion being denied. Courtesy copies have not been received in Department 302 and therefore the motion is denied. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Ntc Of Hearing On Petititon To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-26-2014 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER BROADCAST MUSIC, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment is continued to January 26, 2015 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 26, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
